message:
refactor(extras): Replace duplicate text width functions with ftui-text imports

Code Deduplication:
- Remove local grapheme_width(), text_width(), ascii_display_width(),
  and is_zero_width_codepoint() functions from filepicker.rs
- Import display_width and grapheme_width from ftui_text instead
- Simplify text_width() to delegate directly to display_width()

Rationale:
- ftui-text is the canonical source for text/grapheme width calculations
- Eliminates 50+ lines of duplicated width calculation logic
- Ensures consistent behavior across the codebase
- Any improvements to ftui-text (like emoji width fixes) automatically
  apply to the filepicker without additional changes

The filepicker's truncate_to_width() still uses local graphemes() import
from ftui_text for character-by-character truncation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
